text:
06). There are 
different ways to classify dually eligible beneficiaries. 

The addition of the dual status code value 10 in MBSF ABCD V2 includes subsidized months for Puerto 
Rico, Virgin Islands, and other territories to provide information regarding dual eligibility for all 
Medicare beneficiaries. Prior to MBSF ABCD V2, the MBSF data did not include complete information 
from territories such as Puerto Rico and the Virgin Islands, because these territories do not submit 
dual eligibility
